summary: Fixed three blocking errors in src/components/prototype/MoleculeScene.tsx so the already-implemented explorability features (hover-to-inspect, continuous lone-pair slider, lone-pair drag with VSEPR strain) compile and pass `pnpm run verify`: removed an orphan `setDragKey(null)` call in the pointer-up handler (no such state setter existed), converted the molecule→sliderLp reset from a setState-in-useEffect into the React derived-state pattern using a tracked-prop comparison, and changed `let pt` to `const pt` in the drag raycaster.
evidence: `pnpm run verify` now exits with `✖ 6 problems (0 errors, 6 warnings)` — all remaining warnings are pre-existing `@next/next/no-img-element` notices on unrelated chat/prototype components.

Before the edits, `pnpm run verify` failed with `TS2304: Cannot find name 'setDragKey'` at MoleculeScene.tsx:1121, then with `react-hooks/set-state-in-effect` at line 538 and `prefer-const` on the `pt` ray-sphere intersection variable; each was addressed with the minimum behavior-preserving change.

MoleculeScene.tsx already contains the full feature set required by the brief: `LonePairSlider` (lines 1281–1343) drives a continuous `sliderLp` (0..3) that feeds `parameterized5Domain` for interpolated geometries; `InspectTooltip` (lines 1345–1378) reads `USERDATA_INSPECT` payloads attached to atoms/bonds/lone pairs/plane/angle during `buildScene`; and `onPointerDown`/`onPointerMove`/`onPointerUp` (lines 1076–1122) implement grab-and-drag of lone pairs with `computeStrainAtDirection` strain glow and `nearestStableSeatForLp` snap-back.
